reproduction_priority: For exact pixel reproduction, decode lossless_reference_png_base64 and place it at x=0,y=0 on a 1024x1024 canvas.
For editable approximation, render svg_approximation. It traces visible contours from the raster and approximates the feather gradient.
For generative recreation, use the semantic_layout, palette, and prompt fields; preserve all stated dimensions and spacing.

coordinate_system.note: All bounding boxes use [left, top, right, bottom] inclusive pixel coordinates.

background.notes: The source file is fully opaque. The background is visually white with minor off-white antialiased edge pixels around the logo.

global_appearance.composition: Centered vertical logo lockup: stylized feather/quill icon above a single-line wordmark reading VeraDoc.pe.

features: white diagonal central shaft/cutout from lower-left to upper-right
two pale cyan water-like curved strokes below the quill

wordmark_description.notes: Use traced letter outlines for highest fidelity. If using text rendering instead, adjust font and tracking until the wordmark occupies x=245..767 and y=636..718.

notes: This is an editable vector-style approximation traced from the visible raster mask.
It preserves object contours and layout, but it does not preserve every antialias pixel or the exact multi-tone raster gradient.
The exact source is stored in lossless_reference_png_base64.

generation_prompt.positive: Create a clean centered logo on a square 1024x1024 white canvas. At the vertical center top area, place a stylized quill feather icon leaning up to the right. The feather has a deep navy blue lower section, blue-purple middle transition, and bright red-orange upper tip, with a crisp white diagonal central shaft/cutout running from the lower-left base toward the upper-right. Beneath the quill base, add two soft pale-cyan water wave strokes. Below the icon, centered, place the wordmark VeraDoc.pe in a modern light geometric sans-serif font, dark charcoal gray, with the wordmark spanning roughly x=245 to x=767 and y=636 to y=718. Keep generous white space around the logo. No shadow, no border, no extra icons.
generation_prompt.negative: Do not add gradients to the background. Do not use a transparent background. Do not add a document icon, pen nib, seal, checkmark, QR code, tagline, slogan, or additional text. Do not make the feather realistic; keep it as a clean vector-style mark. Do not change the text from VeraDoc.pe.
